data.title: SALOMON opens new Anfu Concept Store in Shanghai, blending French heritage with local community for strategic retail upgrade.
data.description: The SALOMON Anfu Concept Store in Shanghai officially opened its doors on August 9, 2025. As a hub for modern mountain sports lifestyle, the store merges SALOMON's French legacy with innovative retail design, creating a unique space for the local community and customers. The new concept store aims to enhance customer experience and engagement, contributing to the brand's growing presence in Shanghai.

data.title: World Liberty Financial considers $1.5B public firm to oversee WLFI tokens for Trump-linked company.
data.description: World Liberty Financial, a company associated with former President Trump, is considering acquiring a treasury company listed on the Nasdaq for $1.5 billion. This move is to facilitate the holding of WLFI tokens within the company.

data.title: RoboSense showcases Active Camera at WRC 2025, as the "Real Eye of Robots."
